item.title: Own Your Value in Negotiations 💼 • Research market rates for your role. • List your key achievements clearly. • Use: “I increased efficiency by 20% at my last job.” • Practice speaking confidently about your skills. • Prepare to counter low offers with data. How can you confidently present your achievements in salary talks? #negotiation #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Own Your Value in Negotiations 💼 • Research market rates for your role. • List your key achievements clearly. • Use: “I increased efficiency by 20% at my last job.” • Practice speaking confidently about your skills. • Prepare to counter low offers with data. How can you confidently present your achievements in salary talks? #negotiation #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
